questions.question: Which of the study countries had the highest purchasing-power-adjusted income in 2025?

What internet restriction did Mozambique impose for the first time in response to an election?
What kinds of principles and priorities do the AI policy frameworks in South Africa, Nigeria, and Egypt emphasize?

What effect do these tactics have on public participation, oversight institutions, and the quality of elections in the countries mentioned?

What kinds of events or situations tend to prompt governments to cut internet access?

What problem do researchers face when trying to obtain data from online platforms for studying elections and other public-interest issues?

What different kinds of connection checks does OONI use to evaluate access to Telegram web, Telegram app endpoints, and the telegram.org domain?
How did OONI determine whether Telegram was being blocked in countries where internet providers used methods other than the usual DNS or block-page techniques?
